etymology.description: 年(年) (nián, "year") + 級(級) (jí, "level; grade") forms a compound word that refers to a specific year level within educational systems, such as "grade" or "year" in school.
etymology.interpretation: 年(年) (nián, "year") indicates the passage of time, while 級(級) (jí, "level; grade") signifies a rank or stage in a sequence. Therefore, 年級(年級) (niánjí, "grade; year") refers to a student's current stage or year in their educational journey.

examples.chinese: 他今年上五年级(他今年上五年級)。
examples.english: He is in the fifth grade this year.

examples.chinese: 六年级的学生正在准备考试(六年級的學生正在準備考試)。
examples.pinyin: Liù niánjí de xuéshēng zhèngzài zhǔnbèi kǎoshì.
examples.english: The sixth-grade students are preparing for the exam.

examples.chinese: 每个年级(每個年級)都有自己的活动(都有自己的活動)。
examples.pinyin: Měi gè niánjí dōu yǒu zìjǐ de huódòng.
examples.english: Each grade has its own activities.
